intended_use: PRAEVAorta®2 is a software intended to be run on its own or as part of another medical device to automatically calculate maximum diameters of anatomical zones from a DICOM CT image containing blood ve
intended_use_full: PRAEVAorta®2 is a software intended to be run on its own or as part of another medical device to automatically calculate maximum diameters of anatomical zones from a DICOM CT image containing blood vessels. PRAEVAorta®2 is designed to measure the maximal transverse diameter of vessels and determine the maximal general diameter using a non-adaptative machine learning algorithm.
ground_truth: Manual measurements performed by four vascular surgeons with at least five years of clinical experience in vascular diseases, with discrepancy no greater than 5 mm
other_metrics: Mean absolute error for total maximum orthogonal aorta diameter: 2.04 mm (95% CI: [1.75 mm; 2.34 mm]); 96.9% of values within ≤5 mm limit; mean bias: -0.75 mm (95% CI: [-1.17 mm; -0.33 mm]); Pearson correlation coefficient: 0.97
